description.value:
Receive Prescription processing script4 building blocks for patient H. XXX_Smit
For more info: https://informatiestandaarden.nictiz.nl/wiki/mp:V3.0.0_kwalificatie_afhandelen_voorschrift_ontvangen
Original description: KWAL script 4 Kwalificatie script 4: afhandelen medicatievoorschrift met meerdere doseerinstructies.
Receive Prescription processing script4 resources in a transaction Bundle
Test server to handle a Bundle of type transaction.
Checks if all resources specified by the scenario can be identified unambiguously.

expression.value: Bundle.entry.resource.where($this is MedicationDispense).where(category.coding.code = '422037009' or category.coding.code = '373784005').where((((medication.where($this is CodeableConcept).coding | medication.where($this is Reference).resolve().code.coding).exists(code = '630586')) and ((medication.where($this is CodeableConcept).coding | medication.where($this is Reference).resolve().code.coding).exists(code = '8060')) and ((medication.where($this is CodeableConcept).coding | medication.where($this is Reference).resolve().code.coding).exists(code = '22276')))).count() = 4

Bundle.entry.resource.where($this is MedicationDispense).where(category.coding.code = '422037009' or category.coding.code = '373784005').where((((medication.where($this is CodeableConcept).coding | medication.where($this is Reference).resolve().code.coding).exists(code = '630586')) and ((medication.where($this is CodeableConcept).coding | medication.where($this is Reference).resolve().code.coding).exists(code = '8060')) and ((medication.where($this is CodeableConcept).coding | medication.where($this is Reference).resolve().code.coding).exists(code = '22276')))).count() = 4

Bundle.entry.resource.where($this is MedicationDispense).where(category.coding.code = '422037009' or category.coding.code = '373784005').where((((medication.where($this is CodeableConcept).coding | medication.where($this is Reference).resolve().code.coding).exists(code = '630586')) and ((medication.where($this is CodeableConcept).coding | medication.where($this is Reference).resolve().code.coding).exists(code = '8060')) and ((medication.where($this is CodeableConcept).coding | medication.where($this is Reference).resolve().code.coding).exists(code = '22276')))).count() = 4

Bundle.entry.resource.where($this is MedicationDispense).where(category.coding.code = '422037009' or category.coding.code = '373784005').where((((medication.where($this is CodeableConcept).coding | medication.where($this is Reference).resolve().code.coding).exists(code = '630586')) and ((medication.where($this is CodeableConcept).coding | medication.where($this is Reference).resolve().code.coding).exists(code = '8060')) and ((medication.where($this is CodeableConcept).coding | medication.where($this is Reference).resolve().code.coding).exists(code = '22276')))).count() = 4

description.value: Confirm that the response Bundle contains 1 Medication resource that contains code '630586|urn:oid:2.16.840.1.113883.2.4.4.7' (DICLOFENAC NATRIUM AUROBINDO TABLET MSR 25MG)
